steps.title: Calculate total ounces of chocolate needed
steps.content:
Each muffin requires 2.5 ounces, and we're making 48 muffins.

$$2.5 \text{ ounces/muffin} \times 48 \text{ muffins} = 120 \text{ ounces}$$

steps.title: Convert ounces to pounds
steps.content:
The problem asks for the answer in pounds. Use the given conversion: 1 pound = 16 ounces.

$$\frac{120 \text{ ounces}}{16 \text{ ounces/pound}} = 7.5 \text{ pounds}$$

That matches choice A — A is correct.
